description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a before_script to run npm install, caches the node_modules/ directory per job with key $CI_JOB_NAME and untracked files, and defines three test jobs named test:node18, test:node20, and test:node22. Each job runs in the default test stage, uses the Docker images node:18, node:20, and node:22 respectively, and executes the shared script npm run lint followed by npm test. No additional stages, artifacts, or rules are specified.
